_comment: Canonical LABEL_SEP ranges = (JS \s UNION python \s) + underscore + DASH. Dash recognizes dashed SSN-class labels (tax-id, social-security) — conservative-correct, an SSN-class identifier. Identical explicit class both runtimes (JS \s and python \s are INCOMPARABLE). JS+python assert live \s subset of this + build LABEL_SEP from it.
